name: Patient 19
history: Recurring relationship problems with husband Ivan. Work stress. Sister Emma is supportive. Father's career success influences expectations. Recently laid off.
intermediate_belief: Losing my job proves I'm not as capable as my father.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm failing at both work and marriage.
situation: Received a job rejection email while searching for work.
auto_thought: "No one wants me. I'm not good enough. My father would be disappointed."
behavior: Deletes email immediately, tells Ivan 'nothing yet,' spirals into negative self-talk.
